mentions.note: Cannot buy at current levels; wrong stock; inferior to McDonald's which had fantastic quarter.
Cramer worried—wife stopped eating Baconator due to health (knee replacement). Demand signal deteriorating; proceed cautiously.
Cut quarterly dividend from 25 cents to 14 cents (44% cut) and now yields 8%—unsustainably high level indicating market fears further dividend cuts ahead.
Digital sales 23% of mix and new AI drive-throughs rolling out, but franchise base not strong enough; group very challenged with even McDonald's struggling; turnaround thesis too optimistic.
Digital mix and AI drive-throughs won't outrun the U.S. consumer slump; franchisee base too weak for the turnaround — no to owning it.
